title: Operation Buttons
text: Operation Buttons Operation buttons activate the operations of the form with which they are associated. If the form does not contain the named operation the button is disabled. Operation buttons can be defined in panels at form-level. The operations in the panel definition must correspond to the operations defined in the form's Operations trigger. They must also have the same name. Operations defined in the panel that do not exist in the form are disabled. Note: Operation buttons are not displayed if the panel is used as a pop-up panel.
